name: i-contain-multitudes-the-microbes-within-us-and-a-grander-view-of-life
description: Ed Yong's 'I Contain Multitudes: The Microbes Within Us and a Grander View of Life' — a journey into the microbial world. The microbiome, symbiosis, and how microbes shape animal bodies, health, and evolution. From termites and squid to the human gut, Yong reveals the hidden partnerships that make life possible.
